---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
author: ""
date: Jul 16, 2026
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    theme: cosmo
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 5
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(tidyverse)
library(baseballr)
library(jsonlite)
```

## Introduction


## Acquire


```{r}
#| label: acquire

season_year  <- 2026
season_start <- "2026-03-01"
today_date <- "2026-07-20"
streak_start_date <- as.Date("2026-07-03")

# ---- Source 1a: Baseball-Reference team game log ----

# All Red Sox game outcomes from 2026. One row for date, win/loss, starting pitcher, attendance, etc. 

bos_games <- bref_team_results(Tm = "BOS", year = season_year)
write_csv(bos_games, "data/raw/bos_team_results_2026.csv")

# ---- Source 1b: Baseball-Reference player stats log ----

#In-depth Red-Sox player stats divided by before streak vs after streak.

#Boston batting stats before streak
before_batters <- bref_daily_batter(t1 = season_start, t2 = as.character(streak_start_date - 1)) %>% 
  filter(Team == "Boston")
write_csv(before_batters, "data/raw/bos_batters_before_2026.csv")

#Boston batting stats during streak
streak_batters <- bref_daily_batter(t1 = streak_start_date, t2 = today_date) %>% 
  filter(Team == "Boston")
write_csv(streak_batters, "data/raw/bos_batters_streak_2026.csv")

#Boston pitching stats before streak
before_pitchers <- bref_daily_pitcher(t1 = season_start, t2 = as.character(streak_start_date - 1)) %>% 
  filter(Team == "Boston")
write_csv(before_pitchers, "data/raw/bos_pitchers_before_2026.csv")

#Boston pitching stats after streak
streak_pitchers <- bref_daily_pitcher(t1 = as.character(streak_start_date), t2 = today_date) %>% 
  filter(Team == "Boston")
write_csv(streak_pitchers, "data/raw/bos_pitchers_streak_2026.csv")

# ---- Source 2: Official MLB transaction data using API call ----

#All Red Sox roster changes throughout 2026


url <- paste0(
  "https://statsapi.mlb.com/api/v1/transactions?teamId=111",
  "&startDate=", season_start,
  "&endDate=", today_date
)

result <- fromJSON(url)

bos_transactions <- result$transactions %>% 
  mutate(
    player_name = person$fullName,
    to_team = toTeam$name,
    from_team = fromTeam$name
  ) %>% 
  select(-person, -toTeam, -fromTeam)

write_csv(bos_transactions, "data/raw/bos_transactions_2026.csv")
```

## Wrangle


```{r}
#| label: wrangle

#read back data from data folder
bos_games <- read_csv("data/raw/bos_team_results_2026.csv")
bos_transactions <- read_csv("data/raw/bos_transactions_2026.csv")
bos_batters_before <- read_csv("data/raw/bos_batters_before_2026.csv")
bos_batters_streak <- read_csv("data/raw/bos_batters_streak_2026.csv")
bos_pitchers_before <- read_csv("data/raw/bos_pitchers_before_2026.csv")
bos_pitchers_streak <- read_csv("data/raw/bos_pitchers_streak_2026.csv")

#clean game data
bos_games <- bos_games |>
  mutate(
    Date_clean = str_remove(Date, " \\(\\d\\)$"), # strip doubleheader marker (1)/(2)
    game_date = as.Date(paste(Date_clean, Year), format = "%A, %b %d %Y"), #reformat dates 
    win = str_starts(Result, "W"), #win column as factor 
    H_A = factor(H_A, levels = c("H", "A"), labels = c("Home", "Away")), #home/away as factor
    `D/N` = factor(`D/N`, levels = c("D", "N"), labels = c("Day", "Night")) #day/ night as factor
  )

#clean transactions data
bos_transactions <- bos_transactions %>% 
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) #date as string to date 

#group transactions by date and summarize 
transactions_by_date <- bos_transactions %>% 
  group_by(date) %>% 
  summarize(
    n_transactions = n(),
    transaction_summary = toString(player_name) #vector of player names -> string
    )
  
#join game data and transaction data by date
bos_games <- bos_games %>% 
  left_join(transactions_by_date, by = c("game_date" = "date")) |>
  mutate(n_transactions = replace_na(n_transactions, 0))

#add a variable to distinguish between during vs before streak
bos_batters_before <- bos_batters_before %>% mutate(period = "before")
bos_batters_streak <- bos_batters_streak %>% mutate(period = "streak")
bos_pitchers_before <- bos_pitchers_before %>% mutate(period = "before")
bos_pitchers_streak <- bos_pitchers_streak %>% mutate(period = "streak")

#binds rows of batting stats before vs after streak to create comparable data set
bos_batters_compare <- bind_rows(bos_batters_before, bos_batters_streak) %>% 
  mutate(period = factor(period, levels = c("before", "streak"))) #make before vs during streak a factor

#binds rows of pitching stats before vs after streak to create comparable data set
bos_pitchers_compare <- bind_rows(bos_pitchers_before, bos_pitchers_streak) %>% 
  mutate(period = factor(period, levels = c("before", "streak")))
```

## Visualize


```{r}
#| label: visualize-1

#---- OPS dumbbell chart ----

#data set including only players with ABS during and before streak
batters_both <- bos_batters_compare %>% 
  group_by(Name) %>% 
  filter(n_distinct(period) == 2) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  filter(!(Name %in% c("Nate Eaton","Anthony Seigler" )))

#order batters by ops for graph
ops_order <- batters_both %>% 
  select(Name, period, OPS) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = period, values_from = OPS) %>% 
  mutate(change = streak - before) %>% 
  arrange(change) %>% 
  pull(Name)

batters_both <- batters_both %>% 
  mutate(Name = factor(Name, levels = ops_order))

#ops dumbbell plot code
ops_dumbell_plot <- ggplot(batters_both, aes(x = Name, y = OPS)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = Name), color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(aes(color = period), size = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(before = "#7FB3D5", streak = "#0C2340"),
                      labels = c("Before streak", "During streak")) +
  labs(
    title = "Red Sox hitters' OPS jumped across the board during the win streak",
    subtitle = "Each line connects one player's OPS before vs. during the 13-game winstreak",
    x = NULL, y = "OPS", color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )


#---- Pitching metric comparison chart ----

# combine all pitchers together and total up their innings/runs/etc by period
team_pitching <- bos_pitchers_compare %>%
  group_by(period) %>%
  summarize(
    total_IP = sum(IP), # total innings pitched by the whole staff
    total_ER = sum(ER), # earned runs allowed
    total_H  = sum(H),
    total_BB = sum(BB),
    total_SO = sum(SO),
    team_ERA  = 9 * total_ER / total_IP, # team earned run average
    team_WHIP = (total_H + total_BB) / total_IP, # walks + hits per inning
    team_K9   = 9 * total_SO / total_IP, # strikeouts per 9 innings
    team_BB9  = 9 * total_BB / total_IP # walks per 9 innings
  )

# reshape so each stat can be compared side by side
team_pitching_long <- team_pitching %>%
  select(period, team_ERA, team_WHIP, team_K9, team_BB9) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("team_"), names_to = "stat", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(stat = recode(stat, team_ERA = "ERA", team_WHIP = "WHIP", team_K9 = "K per 9", team_BB9 = "BB per 9"))

# bar chart comparing overall team pitching stats before vs during the streak
ggplot(team_pitching_long, aes(x = period, y = value, fill = period)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ stat, scales = "free_y") + # each stat gets its own scale since ERA/WHIP/K9/BB9 are on different ranges
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(before = "#7FB3D5", streak = "#0C2340")) +
  labs(
    title = "Team pitching improved across the board during the win streak",
    subtitle = "Aggregate Red Sox pitching stats, before vs. during the 12-game streak",
    x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)






```

## Communicate


## Conclusion
